name: env_loader — ambient FORGE_API_PORT is not overridden by stale .env value (ambient wins)
description: Stage 13.8-5 regression guard. When process.env.FORGE_API_PORT is already set to '3100' (ambient — as pm2 injects from ecosystem.config.js) and .env contains the stale FORGE_API_PORT=4100, loadDotEnv() must NOT override the ambient value. RED (before 13.8-6): env_loader.js does not exist → port_ambient_preserved false. GREEN (after 13.8-6): ambient value preserved.
